description: python-nmap is a Python class to use nmap port scanner. It allows to manipulate nmap scan results in Python.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/python-nmap && python3 python-nmap.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/python-nmap && python3 python-nmap.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/python-nmap && python3 python-nmap.py --help`. Nmap wrapper for Python.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the recon category. Fits when the engagement needs: Nmap wrapper for Python.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: Nmap wrapper for Python.

name: python-nmap
